LanguageData.LC_CaptureEntityDesc: Order {0} to be captured and carried to an LC holding platform.
LanguageData.LC_CancelTransferDesc: Cancel the transfer to another LC holding platform.
LanguageData.LC_MessageTargetBelowMinimumContainmentS: {0} does not have enough containment strength to safely hold {1}.
LanguageData.LC_MessageNoPlatformWithMinimumContainme: No available LC holding platform can safely contain {0}.
LanguageData.LC_CommandToggleStudyDesc: Allow assigned employees to perform work on this abnormality.
LanguageData.LC_CanBeStudiedInDuration: Can be worked with again in {0}
